descriptors.name: TTDF_WISUN_NODE_MONITORING_SYSTEM
descriptors.label: TTDF Wi-SUN Node Monitoring System
descriptors.description: TTDF Wi-SUN node monitoring and control system with CoAP and OTA DFU support.
descriptors.author: Himanshu Fanibhare

descriptors.name: TTDF_PHY_NODE_MONITORING
descriptors.label: TTDF PHY Node Monitoring
descriptors.description: PHY-focused Wi-SUN node monitoring project with CoAP and OTA DFU support.
descriptors.author: Himanshu Fanibhare
